pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/docker_build_cache_debug/setup_task.sh:47-52 (EXPOSE 5000 and healthcheck) and examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/docker_build_cache_debug/export_result.sh:94-114 (health probe via curl on port 5000)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/docker_build_cache_debug/verifier.py:63-73 (adds 20 pts when apt-get is before source copy)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/docker_build_cache_debug/verifier.py:82-88 (adds 20 pts for pip install before source copy)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/docker_build_cache_debug/verifier.py:74-80 (adds 20 pts when requirements.txt is copied before pip install)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/docker_build_cache_debug/verifier.py:96-105 (awards up to 5 pts each for ignoring .git and __pycache__ to total 10)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/docker_build_cache_debug/verifier.py:108-123 (adds 10 pts when the image exists with the pip layer)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/docker_build_cache_debug/verifier.py:108-121 (adds 10 pts when the container passes the health check)

privileged_info_summary: Setup writes a custom Flask app, Dockerfile, requirements, heavy .git folder, and supporting files directly under /home/ga/build-project, so the task data is synthetic; the Dockerfile exposes port 5000 and the verifier/exports use build-project:optimized for the image tag; scoring increments (apt, pip, requirements, dockerignore, image, container) match verifier.py precisely.
